selected_markets.title: Will the **high temp in Denver** be <54° on Feb 14, 2026?

valuations.rationale: February 14 in Denver historically averages high temps around 45-48°F. A high <54°F is common but not guaranteed. Mid-prob of 0.065 appears slightly underpriced given historical frequency; adjusting upward by ~10% for seasonal baseline. Moderate confidence due to weather volatility and limited volume (1020).
